holdReason: NOT A DEGREE-GRANTING HIGHER-EDUCATION MEDICAL UNIVERSITY. Batumi Medical Academy (BMEDA) is a Georgian VOCATIONAL EDUCATION (VET) college, licensed and regulated under Georgia's 'Board of Authorization of Vocational Education Institutions' (confirmed on BMEDA's own 'Authorization decision' page, listing VET authorization decisions from 2014-2019). It is a member of the Association of Private Colleges of Georgia. Its only programs (per its own 'Educational programs' page) are vocational/certificate-level: Pharmacy, Dental Technician Program, and Nursing education -- delivered as sub-degree vocational training in Georgian, aimed at the domestic Georgian healthcare workforce, not as internationally recognized bachelor's/professional degrees (no MBBS, no BSc Nursing bachelor's degree, no BDS, no Pharmacy degree, no medical-pg). There is therefore no valid courseSlug match in {mbbs, medical-pg, bsc-nursing, pharmacy, bds} for a genuine degree program here, and no basis to claim NMC/PCI/INC relevance for Indian students. Independent MBBS-abroad consultant sites confirm the actual MBBS-granting institutions in Batumi are separate entities: Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University and Avicenna Batumi Medical University -- NOT Batumi Medical Academy. Publishing a page for BMEDA under this site's India-outbound-degree-seeker content model would misrepresent a vocational college as a medical/degree university, which the sourcing rules and hard 'never fabricate' rule for this project prohibit. Recommendation: do not publish; if Batumi coverage is desired, research Batumi Shota Rustaveli State University or Avicenna Batumi Medical University instead as separate, distinct entries.
